parts.text:
**Summary:**

All packages pass except one:

**FAIL: `github.com/jrswab/axe/internal/provider`**

```
--- FAIL: TestResolveCredentials_File (0.00s)
    awscreds_test.go:47: unexpected error: AWS credentials not found: set
        AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID and AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, or configure
        ~/.aws/credentials: profile "gloo-ai-engineering-287315745423" not
        found or missing credentials
```

The failure is in `internal/provider/awscreds_test.go:47`. The test `TestResolveCredentials_File` expects a specific AWS profile (`gloo-ai-engineering-287315745423`) to exist in `~/.aws/credentials`, but it's not present on this machine. This is an environment-dependent test — it requires local AWS credential configuration to pass.
